about.description: Check GitHub Releases for a newer version. No personal data is collected during the check.

dialog.title: Update available
dialog.subtitle: A newer version than the one you're running was found.
dialog.platformNoteMac: Because the macOS build is unsigned, we'll open the GitHub page so you can download and replace the old version manually.
dialog.platformNoteWindowsAutoUpdate: Click the button below to download and install the new version automatically. The app will restart when it's done.
dialog.platformNotePortable: The portable build can't auto-update. Please grab the latest version from the GitHub page.

toast.skipped: Skipped v{{version}} — you'll still be notified when newer versions come out
